name: Tropical Chicken Kabobs
recipeIngredient: 6 Chicken Breast Halves - boneless, cut into 2-inch pieces
1 large Green Pepper; seeded, cut into 2-inch pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine lime juice, vegetable oil, and honey in a shallow dish.
2. Add chicken; toss gently. Cover and refrigerate for 8 hours or overnight, stirring occasionally.
3. Remove chicken from marinade, reserving the marinade.
4. Alternate chicken, onion, pepper, papaya, and pineapple on 6-inch long skewers.
5. Coat grill rack with Pam cooking spray.
6. Place rack on grill over medium-hot coals.
7. Place kabobs on rack, and cook for 15-20 minutes or until done, turning and basting frequently with reserved marinade.
